center.name: 瑙漢湖
center.summary: 瑙漢湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mindoro boobook，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas in Mounts Iglit-Baco National Park (which is also the stronghold of the critically endangered Tamaraw) and Naujan Lake National Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas in Mounts Iglit-Baco National Park (which is also the stronghold of the critically endangered Tamaraw) and Naujan Lake National Park
